fault_hypothesis: Line 68 uses simple `int()` (floor truncation) to convert planned allocations to integers, which loses fractional remainders and causes the sum of allocations to be less than the total budget when weights don't divide evenly.

constraints.intent: After integer conversion, the sum of allocations must equal the total budget.
The integer allocations should sum to the same total as the planned (continuous) allocations rounded to an integer.
Before returning, the total of all allocations must equal the original total budget.
After the integer-allocation branch, allocations must still sum to the total.
